summary: Iteration 60: PhoneDemo component testing + CRO feature regression. All features PASSED. New PhoneDemo component renders correctly with animated phone mockup showing complete app flow (idle→searching→found→alert). All existing CRO features continue working.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Demo section renders with title 'Míralo en acción'
FRONTEND: PhoneDemo component visible with phone mockup
FRONTEND: Phone mockup shows ManoProtect app header
FRONTEND: Idle phase shows Alejandro card (Hijo - 15 años) + 'Solicitar ubicación' button + SOS button
FRONTEND: Searching phase shows 'Buscando a Alejandro...' with radar pulse animation + 'Localizando GPS...'
FRONTEND: Found phase shows map with grid lines + location pin with 'A' marker
FRONTEND: Alert phase shows notification banner 'Alejandro está en Calle Mayor 12, Madrid'
FRONTEND: Animation cycles through all phases correctly (idle→tap→searching→found→alert→loop)
FRONTEND: 4 demo description steps visible on right side of phone (numbered 1-4)
FRONTEND: Demo CTA 'Activar protección ahora' navigates to /registro
FRONTEND: Step indicators visible below phone mockup
FRONTEND: Hero section renders with A/B test content (both control and variant_a headlines seen)
FRONTEND: Trust bar visible with VISA, MC, PayPal badges
FRONTEND: Pricing section renders with Plan Mensual (9,99€) and Plan Anual (99,99€)
FRONTEND: FAQ section expandable - clicking expands to show answer
FRONTEND: Mobile responsive - phone demo displays properly on 390x844 viewport
FRONTEND: Mobile sticky CTA visible at bottom of screen
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/ab-test/hero_headline - returns variant (control/variant_a) with config
BACKEND: POST /api/cro/track - tracks events successfully, returns event_id
BACKEND: GET /api/cro/dashboard - returns today metrics, email sequences, active A/B tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhoneDemo component fully tested. Key implementation details: Uses IntersectionObserver to trigger animation when section visible. Animation phases: idle(2s)→tap(0.8s)→searching(2.5s)→found(3s)→alert(3.5s)→loop. Phase-specific elements: idle shows Alejandro card + Solicitar ubicación button; searching shows radar pulse + 'Localizando GPS'; found shows map with grid + location pin; alert shows notification banner. CTA navigates to /registro. Mobile responsive with grid layout switching to stack. All CRO features from iteration 59 continue working.

phases_tested.idle: Alejandro card visible, 'Solicitar ubicación' button, 'Botón SOS'
phases_tested.searching: Text 'Buscando a Alejandro...', radar pulse animation, 'Localizando GPS...'
phases_tested.found: Map with grid lines, location pin with 'A', accuracy circle, 'Alejandro localizado' card
phases_tested.alert: Push notification banner showing location confirmation

ui_elements.step_indicators: 4 dots below phone showing current phase
ui_elements.demo_steps: 4 numbered steps on right side describing flow

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via SendGrid is MOCKED (sequences tracked but not sent)
